architecture.summary: This is a survey paper on symbolic knowledge distillation in large language models. It does not present a novel system or mechanism, but rather reviews and categorizes existing research on the process of extracting implicit knowledge from LLMs (such as GPT-3 and BERT) and converting it into explicit, symbolic form to improve interpretability, efficiency, and applicability of smaller AI models.

biblio.title: A Survey on Symbolic Knowledge Distillation of Large Language Models

claims.statement: Symbolic knowledge distillation is crucial for enhancing the interpretability, efficiency, and applicability of LLMs
The core challenge of symbolic knowledge distillation is maintaining the depth of knowledge in a comprehensible format
Symbolic knowledge distillation can be used to improve the transparency and functionality of smaller, more efficient artificial intelligence models
